**MARMIDON ENTERPRISE SOFTWARE · WEBSITE PROGRAMME**

**MARM-WEB-SIA-003**

**Site Map & Information Architecture**

Page Hierarchy, Navigation, URLs & Redirects

_The structural map of <www.marmidon.com> - every page, how it nests, how users navigate, the URL conventions and the redirect plan for a clean migration from the placeholder site._

| **Document**  | Site Map & Information Architecture (SIA)     |
| ------------- | --------------------------------------------- |
| **Programme** | Marmidon Corporate Website Revamp 2026        |
| **Parent**    | MARM-WEB-PRD-001 (Requirements)               |
| **Version**   | 1.0 - Issued for Development                  |
| **Modules**   | 11 · Sectors: 12                              |
| **Old site**  | marmidon.kimdigitary.com → <www.marmidon.com> |
| **Audience**  | Web developer, content team, SEO              |

**PREPARED BY**

**Marmidon Website Programme - Business Analysis Workstream**

Senior Business Analyst (Corporate & Enterprise Web)

_CONFIDENTIAL - For the Marmidon website development team and authorised stakeholders only._

**Table of Contents**

# **1\. Purpose & IA Model**

_Information architecture is the architecture of the sales argument: organise it well and prospects reach the demo; organise it poorly and they leave._

This document defines the structure of the Marmidon website - the pages, their hierarchy, the navigation that connects them, and the URL and redirect conventions. It implements the scope and requirements of **MARM-WEB-PRD-001** and aligns page-for-page with the blueprints in **MARM-WEB-WDD-002** and the content slots in **MARM-WEB-CPM-005**.

## **1.1 The IA model: hub-and-spoke**

Marmidon's site uses the hub-and-spoke pattern standard among leading ERP vendors. Broad hub pages (Products, Solutions, Resources, Customers) give an overview and route visitors to deep spoke pages (individual modules, sectors, articles, case studies). This lets each persona drill exactly to what they need while keeping the top level simple.

**BENCHMARK · Why this structure**

Benchmarking of NetSuite, Odoo, Acumatica, SAP, Sage and Epicor shows the same top-level grammar - Products/Modules · Solutions/Industries · Resources · Customers · Pricing · Partners · About · Contact. Adopting it makes Marmidon instantly legible to anyone who has evaluated an ERP before.

## **1.2 Architecture validation test**

Before build sign-off, show the site map to 5-10 people in the target audience and ask: "if you wanted to learn about X, where would you click?" If they cannot find it on the first guess, the architecture needs revision. This is a launch-gate check (PRD §12).

**SECTION 2**

**Visual Site Map**

The whole site at a glance

# **2\. Visual Site Map**

The tree below shows the full page hierarchy. Level 0 is the homepage; level 1 are the primary navigation sections; level 2/3 are the pages and detail pages beneath them.

**NOTE · Legend**

▣ Home ▸ Section (L1) • Page (L2) ◦ Detail/spoke (L3). URLs shown in italics are the canonical paths defined in §5.

**▣ Home** _/_

**▸ Products (hub)** _/products_

**•** Financial Management & Accounting _/products/financials_

**•** Human Resources & Payroll _/products/hr-payroll_

**•** Inventory & Warehouse _/products/inventory_

**•** Procurement & Suppliers _/products/procurement_

**•** Sales & CRM _/products/sales-crm_

**•** Operations Management _/products/operations_

**•** Fleet Management _/products/fleet_

**•** Manufacturing & Production _/products/manufacturing_

**•** Point of Sale & Retail _/products/pos-retail_

**•** Business Intelligence & Dashboards _/products/business-intelligence_

**•** Project & Job Costing _/products/projects_

**▸ Solutions by Industry (hub)** _/solutions_

**•** Manufacturing _/solutions/manufacturing_

**•** Production _/solutions/production_

**•** Wholesale _/solutions/wholesale_

**•** Retail _/solutions/retail_

**•** Distribution _/solutions/distribution_

**•** Professional Services _/solutions/professional-services_

**•** Education _/solutions/education_

**•** Healthcare _/solutions/healthcare_

**•** Hospitality _/solutions/hospitality_

**•** Non-Profit _/solutions/non-profit_

**•** Construction _/solutions/construction_

**•** Media & Publishing _/solutions/media-publishing_

**▸ Customers (hub)** _/customers_

**•** Case study (detail template) _/customers/\[slug\]_

**▸ Resources (hub)** _/resources_

**•** Blog / Insights _/resources/blog_

**◦** Article (detail template) _/resources/blog/\[slug\]_

**•** Guides & Whitepapers (gated) _/resources/guides_

**•** FAQs _/resources/faqs_

**▸ Pricing** _/pricing_

**▸ Partners** _/partners_

**•** Become a Partner _/partners/apply_

**▸ Company (hub)** _/company_

**•** About _/company/about_

**•** Leadership / Team _/company/team_

**•** Careers _/company/careers_

**•** Contact _/contact_

**▸ Utility & legal**

**•** Request a Demo _/request-a-demo_

**•** Search results _/search_

**•** Privacy Policy _/legal/privacy_

**•** Terms of Use _/legal/terms_

**•** Cookie Policy _/legal/cookies_

**•** Sitemap (HTML) _/sitemap_

**•** 404 / Error

**SECTION 3**

**Navigation Model**

Primary, mega-menu, footer, breadcrumbs, utility

# **3\. Navigation Model**

## **3.1 Primary navigation (header)**

The header carries the eight primary destinations plus the persistent demo CTA. It is sticky and condenses on scroll (WDD §6.1).

| **Order** | **Nav item**       | **Type**             | **Destination**                          |
| --------- | ------------------ | -------------------- | ---------------------------------------- |
| 1         | Products           | Mega-menu            | /products + all 11 modules               |
| 2         | Solutions          | Mega-menu / dropdown | /solutions + all 12 sectors              |
| 3         | Customers          | Link                 | /customers                               |
| 4         | Resources          | Dropdown             | /resources (blog, guides, FAQs)          |
| 5         | Pricing            | Link                 | /pricing                                 |
| 6         | Partners           | Link                 | /partners                                |
| 7         | Company            | Dropdown             | /company (about, team, careers, contact) |
| 8         | Search             | Icon                 | /search                                  |
| **CTA-A** | **Contact Sales**  | Secondary button     | /contact                                 |
| **CTA-B** | **Request a Demo** | Primary button       | /request-a-demo                          |

## **3.2 Products mega-menu (specification)**

The Products mega-menu exposes the entire module suite at once (FR-NAV-02), grouped to aid scanning, with a featured slot for promotion.

| **Column 1 - Finance & People** | **Column 2 - Supply Chain** | **Column 3 - Operations & Insight** | **Featured**             |
| ------------------------------- | --------------------------- | ----------------------------------- | ------------------------ |
| Financials                      | Inventory & Warehouse       | Operations                          | Promo card:              |
| HR & Payroll                    | Procurement & Suppliers     | Fleet Management                    | "Explore the full suite" |
| Sales & CRM                     | Manufacturing & Production  | Project & Job Costing               | → /products              |
|                                 | POS & Retail                | Business Intelligence               | Request a Demo →         |

## **3.3 Footer (mega-footer)**

The footer mirrors the IA, giving crawlers and users a complete map and reinforcing internal linking (FR-NAV-06).

| **Products**   | **Solutions**   | **Resources** | **Company** | **Connect**                      |
| -------------- | --------------- | ------------- | ----------- | -------------------------------- |
| Top 6 modules  | Top 6 sectors   | Blog          | About       | Contact                          |
| All products → | All solutions → | Guides        | Team        | Request a Demo                   |
|                |                 | FAQs          | Careers     | Social links                     |
|                |                 |               | Partners    | Legal: Privacy · Terms · Cookies |

## **3.4 Breadcrumbs & utility**

- Breadcrumbs appear on all pages below level 1, reflecting the canonical hierarchy (FR-NAV-07), e.g. Home › Products › Inventory & Warehouse.
- Utility nav (search, demo) is always reachable, including in the mobile hamburger menu which exposes the full module and sector lists.
- The HTML sitemap (/sitemap) and XML sitemap (TSR-004) both reflect this structure.

**SECTION 4**

**Page Inventory**

Every page, its template, parent and purpose

# **4\. Complete Page Inventory**

Every page in the launch build, with its template (WDD §7), parent and purpose. Templated page sets (modules ×11, sectors ×12) are listed in full because each is an indexable, content-managed page.

### **4.1 Top-level & hubs**

| **Page**          | **URL**    | **Template**  | **Purpose**                                         |
| ----------------- | ---------- | ------------- | --------------------------------------------------- |
| **Home**          | /          | home          | Value prop, suite & sector overview, proof, convert |
| **Products hub**  | /products  | hub-products  | Overview of all 11 modules; route to spokes         |
| **Solutions hub** | /solutions | hub-solutions | Overview of all 12 sectors; route to spokes         |
| **Customers hub** | /customers | customers     | All case studies + logo wall, filterable            |
| **Resources hub** | /resources | resources     | Blog, guides, FAQs; nurture & SEO                   |
| **Pricing**       | /pricing   | pricing       | How pricing works; quote/demo CTA                   |
| **Partners**      | /partners  | partners      | Programme + apply form                              |
| **Company hub**   | /company   | about         | Mission, story, trust                               |
| **Contact**       | /contact   | contact       | Contact form + channels                             |

### **4.2 Module pages (×11) - template: module**

| **Page**                           | **URL**                         | **Template** | **Purpose**                                              |
| ---------------------------------- | ------------------------------- | ------------ | -------------------------------------------------------- |
| Financial Management & Accounting  | /products/financials            | module       | Module capabilities, outcomes, proof, module-tagged demo |
| Human Resources & Payroll          | /products/hr-payroll            | module       | Module capabilities, outcomes, proof, module-tagged demo |
| Inventory & Warehouse              | /products/inventory             | module       | Module capabilities, outcomes, proof, module-tagged demo |
| Procurement & Suppliers            | /products/procurement           | module       | Module capabilities, outcomes, proof, module-tagged demo |
| Sales & CRM                        | /products/sales-crm             | module       | Module capabilities, outcomes, proof, module-tagged demo |
| Operations Management              | /products/operations            | module       | Module capabilities, outcomes, proof, module-tagged demo |
| Fleet Management                   | /products/fleet                 | module       | Module capabilities, outcomes, proof, module-tagged demo |
| Manufacturing & Production         | /products/manufacturing         | module       | Module capabilities, outcomes, proof, module-tagged demo |
| Point of Sale & Retail             | /products/pos-retail            | module       | Module capabilities, outcomes, proof, module-tagged demo |
| Business Intelligence & Dashboards | /products/business-intelligence | module       | Module capabilities, outcomes, proof, module-tagged demo |
| Project & Job Costing              | /products/projects              | module       | Module capabilities, outcomes, proof, module-tagged demo |

### **4.3 Sector pages (×12) - template: sector**

| **Page**              | **URL**                          | **Template** | **Purpose**                                                  |
| --------------------- | -------------------------------- | ------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Manufacturing         | /solutions/manufacturing         | sector       | Sector pain→outcome, recommended modules, sector-tagged demo |
| Production            | /solutions/production            | sector       | Sector pain→outcome, recommended modules, sector-tagged demo |
| Wholesale             | /solutions/wholesale             | sector       | Sector pain→outcome, recommended modules, sector-tagged demo |
| Retail                | /solutions/retail                | sector       | Sector pain→outcome, recommended modules, sector-tagged demo |
| Distribution          | /solutions/distribution          | sector       | Sector pain→outcome, recommended modules, sector-tagged demo |
| Professional Services | /solutions/professional-services | sector       | Sector pain→outcome, recommended modules, sector-tagged demo |
| Education             | /solutions/education             | sector       | Sector pain→outcome, recommended modules, sector-tagged demo |
| Healthcare            | /solutions/healthcare            | sector       | Sector pain→outcome, recommended modules, sector-tagged demo |
| Hospitality           | /solutions/hospitality           | sector       | Sector pain→outcome, recommended modules, sector-tagged demo |
| Non-Profit            | /solutions/non-profit            | sector       | Sector pain→outcome, recommended modules, sector-tagged demo |
| Construction          | /solutions/construction          | sector       | Sector pain→outcome, recommended modules, sector-tagged demo |
| Media & Publishing    | /solutions/media-publishing      | sector       | Sector pain→outcome, recommended modules, sector-tagged demo |

### **4.4 Resources, company & utility**

| **Page**                  | **URL**                  | **Template** | **Purpose**                    |
| ------------------------- | ------------------------ | ------------ | ------------------------------ |
| Blog / Insights           | /resources/blog          | resources    | Article index                  |
| Article                   | /resources/blog/\[slug\] | article      | Insight post (content-managed) |
| Guides & Whitepapers      | /resources/guides        | resources    | Gated downloads, lead capture  |
| FAQs                      | /resources/faqs          | resources    | Common questions               |
| Case study                | /customers/\[slug\]      | case         | Challenge→solution→result      |
| About                     | /company/about           | about        | Who Marmidon is                |
| Team                      | /company/team            | about        | Leadership profiles            |
| Careers                   | /company/careers         | about        | Open roles & apply             |
| Become a Partner          | /partners/apply          | partners     | Partner enquiry form           |
| Request a Demo            | /request-a-demo          | contact      | Primary conversion form        |
| Search                    | /search                  | utility      | Site search results            |
| Privacy / Terms / Cookies | /legal/\*                | legal        | Compliance pages               |
| HTML Sitemap              | /sitemap                 | utility      | Human-readable map             |
| 404 / Error               | -                        | utility      | Friendly error + nav back      |

**NOTE · Page count at launch**

9 top-level/hub pages + 11 module + 12 sector + ~14 resource/company/utility/legal pages ≈ 46 unique pages and templates, plus unlimited content-managed articles and case studies. This count drives the content matrix (CPM-005) and the build estimate.

**SECTION 5**

**URL Structure & Conventions**

# **5\. URL Structure & Conventions**

| **Rule**           | **Convention**                                  | **Example**                   |
| ------------------ | ----------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------- |
| **Domain**         | Canonical host <www.marmidon.com> over HTTPS    | <https://www.marmidon.com/>   |
| **Case**           | Lowercase only                                  | /products/inventory           |
| **Words**          | Hyphen-separated, no spaces/underscores         | /products/hr-payroll          |
| **Hierarchy**      | Reflect IA: /section/page                       | /solutions/healthcare         |
| **Stability**      | Short, human-readable, stable slugs             | /customers/acme-manufacturing |
| **Trailing slash** | Consistent policy site-wide (pick one, enforce) | no trailing slash             |
| **Parameters**     | Avoid in indexable URLs; use clean paths        | not /page?id=12               |
| **Canonical tags** | Self-referencing canonical on every page        | see TSR-004                   |

**BEST PRACTICE · URLs are forever**

Set the slug conventions now and keep them stable. Changing a URL later costs SEO equity and requires another redirect. Agree the module and sector slugs (above) before build.

**SECTION 6**

**Redirect & Migration Map**

Protecting SEO at domain cutover

# **6\. Redirect & Migration Map**

Migrating from _marmidon.kimdigitary.com_ to **<www.marmidon.com>** must preserve any earned SEO equity and avoid broken links. Every reachable old URL maps to its closest new equivalent via a permanent (301) redirect.

## **6.1 Redirect rules**

| **Old URL pattern**             | **→** | **New URL**                    | **Type** |
| ------------------------------- | ----- | ------------------------------ | -------- |
| marmidon.kimdigitary.com (root) | →     | <https://www.marmidon.com/>    | 301      |
| …/about\*                       | →     | /company/about                 | 301      |
| …/products\* or /services\*     | →     | /products (or specific module) | 301      |
| …/contact\*                     | →     | /contact                       | 301      |
| Any other old path              | →     | Closest equivalent or /        | 301      |
| Non-www / http requests         | →     | <https://www.marmidon.com/…>   | 301      |

**MUST-HAVE · Cutover checklist (launch gate)**

Build the full old→new URL list from the current site & analytics before cutover.

Implement 301s (not 302) for every old URL; force HTTPS and canonical host.

Submit the new XML sitemap to Search Console; keep the old domain pointing via redirects.

Crawl the new site for 404s and redirect chains; fix before go-live.

Monitor Search Console for crawl errors for 30 days post-launch (PRD risk R3).

**SECTION 7**

**Taxonomy, Tagging & Search**

# **7\. Taxonomy, Tagging & On-Site Search**

## **7.1 Content taxonomies**

Consistent taxonomies power filtering, cross-linking and search. Two primary taxonomies - Module and Sector - tag case studies, articles and guides so visitors can filter proof and content to their context.

| **Taxonomy**      | **Terms**                               | **Applied to**                       |
| ----------------- | --------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------ |
| **Module**        | The 11 modules (M1-M11)                 | Case studies, articles, guides, FAQs |
| **Sector**        | The 12 sectors                          | Case studies, articles, sector pages |
| **Resource type** | Blog · Guide · Whitepaper · FAQ         | Resources hub filtering              |
| **Topic / tag**   | Free tags (e.g. compliance, automation) | Articles, related-content            |

## **7.2 On-site search**

- Search indexes pages, modules, sectors, articles and case studies (FR-NAV-08).
- Results grouped/typed where possible; relevant, fast, keyboard-accessible.
- Zero-results state offers popular links and a contact/demo prompt.

## **7.3 Internal linking model**

Internal links are an IA and SEO asset. Each module links to related modules and relevant sectors; each sector links to recommended modules; articles link to related articles and relevant module/sector pages; the footer links the full structure. This hub-and-spoke linking helps users and search/AI engines understand the site.

**SECTION A**

**Appendix - Module × Sector Relevance**

# **Appendix A. Module-to-Sector Relevance Matrix**

Guidance for cross-linking and "recommended modules" on sector pages. ● = highly relevant, ○ = relevant. Use to decide which module cards appear on each sector page and which sectors a module links to.

| **Sector ↓ / Module →** | **Fin** | **HR** | **Inv** | **Proc** | **Sales** | **Ops** | **Fleet** | **Mfg** | **POS** | **BI** | **Proj** |
| ----------------------- | ------- | ------ | ------- | -------- | --------- | ------- | --------- | ------- | ------- | ------ | -------- |
| **Manufacturing**       | **●**   | ○      | **●**   | **●**    | ○         | **●**   | ○         | **●**   |         | **●**  | ○        |
| **Production**          | **●**   | ○      | **●**   | **●**    |           | **●**   |           | **●**   |         | **●**  | ○        |
| **Wholesale**           | **●**   | ○      | **●**   | **●**    | **●**     | ○       | ○         |         | ○       | **●**  |          |
| **Retail**              | **●**   | ○      | **●**   | ○        | **●**     | ○       |           |         | **●**   | **●**  |          |
| **Distribution**        | **●**   | ○      | **●**   | **●**    | **●**     | **●**   | **●**     |         |         | **●**  |          |
| **Prof. Services**      | **●**   | **●**  |         | ○        | **●**     | **●**   |           |         |         | **●**  | **●**    |
| **Education**           | **●**   | **●**  | ○       | **●**    | ○         | ○       | ○         |         |         | **●**  | ○        |
| **Healthcare**          | **●**   | **●**  | **●**   | **●**    | ○         | **●**   | ○         |         |         | **●**  | ○        |
| **Hospitality**         | **●**   | **●**  | **●**   | **●**    | **●**     | **●**   |           |         | **●**   | **●**  |          |
| **Non-Profit**          | **●**   | **●**  | ○       | **●**    | ○         | ○       | ○         |         |         | **●**  | **●**    |
| **Construction**        | **●**   | **●**  | **●**   | **●**    | ○         | **●**   | **●**     |         |         | **●**  | **●**    |
| **Media & Pub.**        | **●**   | **●**  | ○       | ○        | **●**     | **●**   |           |         |         | **●**  | **●**    |

**Key:** Fin=Financials · HR=HR & Payroll · Inv=Inventory · Proc=Procurement · Sales=Sales & CRM · Ops=Operations · Fleet=Fleet · Mfg=Manufacturing · POS=POS & Retail · BI=Business Intelligence · Proj=Projects.

**- End of Document MARM-WEB-SIA-003 -**
